no correctional officer conducted any count or round of the SHU from approximately 10:30 p.m. on August 9 until approximately 6:30 a.m. on August 10, at which time, as alleged herein, NOEL and THOMAS discovered the body of an MCC inmate, Jeffrey Epstein, who had committed suicide overnight while unobserved.

events.event_title: Bill Clinton, Kevin Spacey, Chris Tucker Fly with Epstein on HIV Research Trip, September 2002
events.description: In September 2002, Epstein's private jet carried President Bill Clinton, Kevin Spacey, Chris Tucker, Ghislaine Maxwell, Ronald Burkle, Casey Wasserman, Secretary of Transportation Rodney Slater, and about four young women aged 20-22 on a 10-day HIV research trip to seven countries; the witness flew back commercial from Mozambique.
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein was on the jet and directly organized and funded the HIV research trip with multiple high-profile passengers.

evidence.excerpt: In September 2002, was on JEFFREY EPSTEIN's private jet. On the jet with them was PRESIDENT BILL CLINTON and his staffers DAVID SLADE and DOUG BLAND, four to five Secret Services agents, KEVIN SPACEY, CHRIS TUCKER, RONALD BURKLE, CASEY WASSERMAN and his wife, RODNEY SLATER, who was the Secretary of Transportation, GHISLAINE MAXWELL, and about four young women aged 20 to 22 years old... The reason for the trip was HIV research. They spent ten days flying to seven different countries.
